name: Ruth Callahan
description: President of the Glastonbury Garden Club. Master Gardener, passionate about native plantings and community growing.

name: Jenny Wilkins
description: Retired head librarian and avid perennial gardener. Specializes in hostas, echinacea, and shade garden design in Glastonbury, CT.

name: Linda Chu
description: Garden club member and contributor. Focuses on pollinator-friendly plantings and butterfly gardens.

name: Audrey Simmons
description: Garden club member and book club regular. Writes about seasonal vegetable gardening and container planting.

name: Peggy Doyle
description: Retired librarian and occasional guest contributor. Writes about heritage roses and cottage garden traditions.

name: Dorothy Walsh
description: Longtime garden club member. Specializes in ornamental grasses and late-season perennials.

name: Michael Egan
description: Glastonbury Community Center coordinator. Posts event announcements and venue information for garden club gatherings.

name: Tom Braddock
description: Owner of Glastonbury Garden Center. Occasional contributor with plant availability updates and seasonal advice.

name: Margaret Hooper
description: Library board member and garden club enthusiast. Contributes newsletter summaries and meeting notes.

name: Elena Park
description: Former librarian colleague and gardening enthusiast from Hartford. Guest writer on shade-tolerant woodland plants.

name: Susan Marsh
description: Community events organizer. Posts announcements for garden-themed church and community fundraisers.

name: James Whitfield
description: Library volunteer and tech helper. Manages the club website behind the scenes and assists members with digital submissions.
